title: cytisus paivae
intro: Cytisus paivae, also known as the Paiva's broom or Paiva's broom tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Native to the Azores, this shrub has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cytisus paivae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Cytisus paivae is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
